allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name; "---"; Get-ChildItem -Force -Recurse -Depth 2 | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { "gh OK: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh --version | Select-Object -First 1; "---AUTH---"; gh auth status 2>&1 } else { "gh ainda nao no PATH desta sessao" })

PowerShell("GH_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GH_TOKEN\)"; "GITHUB_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GITHUB_TOKEN\)"; $hosts = "$env:AppData\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml"; "hosts.yml exists: $\(Test-Path $hosts\) \($hosts\)"; if \(Test-Path $hosts\) { Get-Content $hosts })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh auth status 2>&1; "--- repo check ---"; gh repo view brenoancampos/moovebox --json name,defaultBranchRef,visibility,url 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); "Total repos:"; gh api 'user/repos?per_page=100&type=all' --jq 'length' 2>&1; "--- names ---"; gh api 'user/repos?per_page=100&type=all' --jq '.[].full_name' 2>&1)
PowerShell("Abrindo o site no navegador padrao...")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); "--- repos no GitHub ---"; gh repo list --limit 20 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh auth setup-git 2>&1; "Credencial do git configurada via gh.")
